headline: DNS Blocking List Expands to 12,000 Malaysian Websites
context: MCMC DNS blocking reached 12,000 websites covering gambling pornography political content and public order threats.

cards.big: MCMC DNS blocking now covers 12,000 websites up from 4,500 in 2022
cards.sub: Blocked categories expanded beyond illegal to include political and news

cards.big: 3,200 gambling 4,800 pornography and 4,000 other categories blocked
cards.sub: Other includes 280 news and political sites classified as threatening order

cards.big: VPN usage grew 65% to 8.5 million users partly to circumvent blocking
cards.sub: MCMC has not attempted to restrict VPN access unlike neighbours

cards.big: Transparency report shows zero judicial orders for 92% of blocks
cards.sub: MCMC blocks under administrative authority without court review

cards.big: DNS blocking expansion tests whether web censorship operates with adequate transparency and oversight
12,000 websites blocked by DNS. Blocking lists grow easily — the harder question is who decides and reviews.
